Giffer

Free open-source creative tool by Ali Guzel / YCSWU.

Purpose:
- Convert image sequences or a single video into GIF or MOV.

Type:
- Hybrid web app and Windows desktop app.

Inputs:
- PNG
- JPEG
- WEBP
- BMP
- MP4
- MOV
- WEBM
- M4V

Outputs:
- GIF
- MOV
- ZIP of visible video frames

Repository:
- https://github.com/aliguzel996/giffer

Releases:
- https://github.com/aliguzel996/giffer/releases/latest

Notes:
- Current local build outputs live under `release/web`, `release/windows`, and `release/itch`.
